title: How to put in email to reply quality assurance team to contact vendor to check on their availability?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: How to put in email to reply quality assurance team to contact vendor to check on their availability?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Dear Quality Assurance Team,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to request that we contact our vendor to check on their availability for an upcoming project. Could you please reach out to them and inquire about their availability?

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to hearing back from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: How to reply them to say that quality assurance will be right person to contact the vendor?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Dear [Your Name],

Thank you for your email. The Quality Assurance team will be the best point of contact to reach out to our vendor and check on their availability for the upcoming project. I will make sure to forward your request to the Quality Assurance team so that they can get in touch with the vendor and communicate with you accordingly.

Should you have any further concerns or questions, please do not hesitate to let me know.

Kind Regards,

[Quality Assurance Team Member's Name]
